title: Paper clay botanical wall panel
notes: Rectangular slab tile (200 mm x 150 mm, 8 mm thick) with pressed botanical impressions arranged as a composition — several leaves of different sizes, a flower head, a seed head, a stem. Fresh botanicals pressed in and peeled away. Two pierced holes at top for wire hanging. PVA sealed. The cellulose in paper clay bridges cracks in thin relief detail better than plain air-dry.
